channel.title: Stockwatch - Key Events
channel.description: Real-time corporate announcements, deals, and financial results.

item.title: [AHL] Abans Fin Services: Karan Heda Appointed as Non-Executive Director
item.description:
Abans Financial Services Ltd's board meeting on May 15, 2026, approved the appointment of Karan Heda as an Additional Non-Executive Director, subject to shareholder approval. V C Shah & Co. were appointed as Internal Auditors for FY2026-27. The registered office has been changed within Mumbai. Raghunathan Mudaliar was appointed as CFO, while Nirbhay Vassa resigned. The board also approved an internal re-organisation of Senior Management Personnel roles.

  • Karan Heda appointed as Additional Non-Executive Director, effective May 15, 2026.
  • V C Shah & Co. appointed as Internal Auditors for FY2026-27.
  • Raghunathan Mudaliar appointed as CFO (Key Managerial Personnel) from May 16, 2026.
  • Nirbhay Vassa relieved of duties as Whole-Time Director & CFO, effective May 15, 2026.
  • Company's registered office changed within Mumbai.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Abans Holdings Ltd | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [AHL] Abans Financial Services Approves Audited FY26 Results
item.description:
Abans Financial Services Ltd's Board of Directors approved the audited standalone and consolidated financial results for the quarter and year ended March 31, 2026, during its meeting on May 15, 2026. The board also reviewed the audit report, statement of assets and liabilities, and cash flow statement. The trading window will be closed for 48 hours following the announcement.

  • Audited financial results (standalone and consolidated) for FY26 approved.
  • M/s. C N K & Associates LLP issued an unmodified opinion on the financial results.
  • Board meeting commenced at 09:00 P.M. (IST) and concluded at 09:45 P.M. (IST).
  • Trading window closed for 48 hours post announcement.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Abans Holdings Ltd | Category: Quarterly Result

item.title: [AHL] Abans Financial Board Approves CFO Change, New Director, Auditor
item.description:
Abans Financial Services Ltd. announced the outcomes of its Board Meeting held on May 15, 2026. Key approvals include the appointment of Mr. Karan Heda as an Additional Non-Executive Director and Mr. Raghunathan Mudaliar as the new Chief Financial Officer (KMP), effective May 16, 2026. This follows the resignation of Mr. Nirbhay Vassa as Whole-Time Director & CFO. The Board also appointed M/s. V C Shah & Co. as Internal Auditors for FY2026-27 and approved a change in the company's registered office within Mumbai. Additionally, an internal re-organisation of Senior Management Personnel roles was approved.

  • Mr. Karan Heda appointed as Additional Non-Executive Director.
  • Mr. Raghunathan Mudaliar named new CFO (KMP), effective May 16, 2026.
  • Mr. Nirbhay Vassa resigned as Whole-Time Director & CFO.
  • M/s. V C Shah & Co. appointed as Internal Auditors for FY2026-27.
  • Company's registered office changed within Nariman Point, Mumbai.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Abans Holdings Ltd | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [DOLPHMED] Dolphin Medical: Open Offer for 26% Shares at ₹4.80
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Rarever Financial Advisors announced an open offer on behalf of Mr. Amarandhar Reddy Kotha and Mr. Mallour Rajesh Kumar to acquire 39,25,988 equity shares of Dolphin Medical Services Ltd, representing 26% of the total paid-up equity, at a price of ₹4.80 per share. This offer complies with SEBI regulations and aims to acquire control of the Target Company.

  • Acquirers to purchase 39,25,988 shares, representing 26% of Dolphin Medical's equity.
  • Offer price is set at ₹4.80 per equity share, payable in cash.
  • Total consideration for the open offer is ₹1,88,44,743.00.
  • Offer made by Amarandhar Reddy Kotha and Mallour Rajesh Kumar.
  • Rarever Financial Advisors is managing the open offer.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: DOLPHIN MEDICAL SERVICES LTD. | Category: Open Offer

item.title: [INDSOYA] Apollo Ingredients Revises Audited Results: Face Value Error
item.description:
Apollo Ingredients Ltd. has revised its audited financial results for the quarter and year ended March 31, 2026, due to a clerical error. The face value of equity shares was incorrectly stated as ₹10/- instead of the correct value of ₹5/-. The company has submitted the revised outcome of the Board Meeting with corrected financial results. This correction is purely clerical and does not impact the company's financial performance or other disclosures. Other board decisions include director changes, remuneration approval, and registered office relocation.

  • Apollo Ingredients corrected face value of equity shares to ₹5/- from ₹10/-.
  • Revised audited financial results submitted for quarter/year ended March 31, 2026.
  • James Mody resigned as non-executive director.
  • Amol Dinkar Nigudkar appointed as an Independent Director.
  • Kirit Ghanshyam Mutreja appointed as Managing Director.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: INDSOYA LTD. | Category: Quarterly Result

item.title: [AHL] Abans Financial Services Approves Audited FY26 Results
item.description:
Abans Financial Services Ltd's Board of Directors approved the audited standalone and consolidated financial results for the quarter and year ended March 31, 2026, during its meeting on May 15, 2026. The audit reports, issued by M/s. C N K & Associates LLP, Chartered Accountants, contained an unmodified opinion. The trading window for dealing in the company's securities will remain closed for 48 hours following the announcement. The meeting commenced at 09:00 P.M. (IST) and concluded at 09:45 P.M. (IST).

  • Audited standalone and consolidated financial results for FY26 approved.
  • Audit reports issued by M/s. C N K & Associates LLP with unmodified opinion.
  • Trading window closed for 48 hours post announcement.
  • Board meeting commenced at 09:00 P.M. (IST) and concluded at 09:45 P.M. (IST).

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Abans Holdings Ltd | Category: Quarterly Result

item.title: [BALRAMCHIN*] Balrampur Chini Q4 FY26: Revenue Up 6.67%, Income Down 30.25%
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Balrampur Chini Mills Ltd (BCML) announced its Q4 FY26 and year-end results on May 15, 2026. The company reported a stable performance in the sugar segment with improved volumes and marginal realization increases, offset by higher sugarcane prices. Distillery segment results were subdued due to stagnant ethanol procurement prices. Q4 FY26 revenue from operations increased by 6.67% to ₹1,603.99 cr, while total comprehensive income decreased by 30.25% to ₹157.23 cr. For FY26, revenue rose by 15.80% to ₹6,271.15 cr, but total comprehensive income fell by 13.33% to ₹380.35 cr. The company is progressing with its 80,000 tons PLA plant, expecting operations to commence in Q3FY27, funded partly by a ₹450 cr preferential equity share issue.

  • Q4 FY26 revenue from operations increased by 6.67% to ₹1,603.99 cr.
  • Q4 FY26 total comprehensive income decreased by 30.25% to ₹157.23 cr.
  • FY26 revenue from operations increased by 15.80% to ₹6,271.15 cr.
  • FY26 total comprehensive income decreased by 13.33% to ₹380.35 cr.
  • PLA plant construction is on track, expecting operations in Q3FY27.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: BALRAMPUR CHINI MILLS LTD. | Category: Quarterly Result

item.title: [FCL] Fineotex Chemical: Monitoring Report for March 2026 Quarter
item.description:
Fineotex Chemical Ltd. has received a revised Monitoring Agency Report from ICRA Limited for the quarter ended March 31, 2026, regarding the utilization of proceeds from a preferential allotment made on July 19, 2024. The report indicates no material deviation from the intended objects of the issue, with the utilization of proceeds being in line with the stated objectives. ICRA clarifies that the report does not comment on the quality, appropriateness, or reasonableness of the company's spending.

  • ICRA's monitoring report confirms Fineotex Chemical's use of preferential issue proceeds aligns with stated objectives.
  • No material deviations were observed in the utilization of funds.
  • ICRA clarifies the report is not an audit and does not independently verify information.
  • Report relates to preferential allotment of equity shares and convertible warrants on July 19, 2024.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: FINEOTEX CHEMICAL LTD. | Category: Business Update

item.title: [FCL] Fineotex Chemical Monitoring Report for Quarter Ended March 2026
item.description:
Fineotex Chemical Ltd's monitoring agency report by ICRA Limited for the quarter ended March 31, 2026, indicates no material deviation in the utilization of proceeds from the preferential allotment made on May 22, 2024. The report confirms that the use of funds is in line with the stated objectives of the issue. The original issue size of ₹280.350 crore was revised to ₹91.963 crore due to undersubscription. 12,51,600 convertible warrants were forfeited, along with the subscription amount of ₹32,47,90,200.

  • ICRA Limited is the monitoring agency for Fineotex Chemical's preferential issue.
  • No material deviation reported in the utilization of issue proceeds.
  • Original issue size revised to ₹91.963 crore due to undersubscription.
  • 12,51,600 convertible warrants forfeited with ₹32.47 crore subscription amount.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: FINEOTEX CHEMICAL LTD. | Category: Regulatory

item.title: [PVP] PVP Ventures: COO Appointment Effective Date Revised
item.description:
PVP Ventures Ltd issued a corrigendum regarding the appointment of Dr. Neeraja Nagarajan as Additional Director and Chief Operating Officer (COO). While the initial announcement stated the appointment would be effective from May 15, 2026, the company clarified that Dr. Nagarajan will assume office from July 1, 2026. All other details from the original board meeting outcome remain unchanged.

  • PVP Ventures clarifies COO appointment date for Dr. Neeraja Nagarajan.
  • Appointment effective date revised to July 1, 2026.
  • Original announcement stated effective date as May 15, 2026.
  • All other details from the board meeting outcome remain unchanged.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: PVP VENTURES LTD. | Category: Clarification
